name: clo-author
description: Codex-native research architecture for empirical social science, from literature review to journal submission.

interface.shortDescription: Empirical social-science research workflows for Codex
interface.longDescription: Bring the Clo-Author research workflow into Codex through natural-language skills, file-backed memory, worker-critic quality gates, and journal-calibrated review references.
defaultPrompt: Set up this repository for a new empirical research project
Run a literature review and data search for my research question
Peer review this paper as if it were headed to a target journal
